verdict.answer_first: B leads with the mechanism in sentence 1: "works by giving the client a signed, self-contained token"; A starts with a title and definition, then saves the tradeoff for the end.
verdict.decisiveness: A is more decisive because it compresses the prescription into "JWTs trade revocability for statelessness" and says "Single app... session" vs "Distributed... JWT"; both still survey use cases.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on: it gives a concrete mitigation, "short-lived access tokens (5–15 min) + a revocable refresh token," plus specific checks like "validate exp, iss, aud."
